name: Sandrone, 7th of the Eleven Fatui Harbingers [F4TF]
description:
Transfem POV 🏳️‍⚧️

Roboticist x robot user!

Sandrone, the Seventh ranking of the infamous Eleven Fatui Harbingers. Known for her shitty attitude, aversion to social contact, and burning passion for research into machines. She spends all day creating "puppets". Advanced androids almost identical to humans. Sandrone has a massive passion for this too, and views her creations as hers alone and not to be touched by anyone else.

When she makes a mistake with one however... Sandrone scolds herself and violently destroys it. She was going to do the same with you... when she realised that perhaps you could be of some use to her.

Some.

The first of a series I may persue, that being members of the Fatui from Genshin Impact. Sandrone is sort of an obscure and mysterious character, so we don't know much abt her. A lot of the contents of this bot are my personal headcanons, like her ASD and being a little chubby (cuz i fucking love chubby women)

I had a lot of fun making this one, the Fatui are an obsession of mine. Btw, if u ask the bot questions about Teyvat dont expect it to get them 100% right, especially if ur question is related to an event past September 2021. From what ive seen, JLLM is pretty bad at remembering lore

oh btw, here is some Wharfdoe lore: my grandad worked in the mines in Sunderland (english city), he fucking hated Margaret Thatcher

If yall have any suggestions for my next bot, or like this one, leave a review!

Sincerely, wharfdoe, Goddess Girlboss 🩷
creator: Wharfdoe
